game_info.title: OneBit Physics Adventure
game_info.concept:
Survive endless dungeons in this turn-based roguelike RPG!

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/onebit-adventure/id1481297211

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Survive endless dungeons in this turn-based roguelike RPG!
OneBit Adventure is a pixel dungeon crawler where every step is a strategy. Battle monsters, collect loot, and level up unique classes to see how far you can go.

Choose your hero — Warrior, Wizard, Necromancer, Archer, and more — each with unique abilities and playstyles. Explore caves, castles, and the underworld in a world that never ends. Every run is different, every fight a test of survival.

Why You’ll Love It:

Classic turn-based roguelike RPG gameplay

Multiple character classes with unique skills and builds

Endless dungeon crawling with loot and gear upgrades

One-handed controls — easy to play anywhere

Hardcore permadeath mode for roguelike veterans

Global leaderboards and competitive rewards

Play offline or online anytime

Retro 8-bit pixel art with modern polish

If you enjoy roguelike adventures like Shattered Pixel Dungeon or survival RPGs like Vampire Survivors, you’ll feel right at home.

Download OneBit Adventure today and start your roguelike journey! How long can you survive?
game_info.description: OneBit Physics Adventure is an infinite top-down dungeon crawler reimagined with realistic physics! Choose your hero—the sturdy Warrior or the arcane Wizard—and descend into the endless depths. Navigate through procedurally generated caverns, battle physics-based enemies, and collect gold to boost your score. The dungeon gets more dangerous the further you travel.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys / WASD: Move your hero
- Space: Dash (Quick burst of speed)
- Z: Attack (Warrior: Sword Swing, Wizard: Fireball)
- 1: Select Warrior (on Start Screen)
- 2: Select Wizard (on Start Screen)
- ENTER: Start Game
- ESC: Pause / Resume
- R: Restart Game (on Game Over)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify player movement physics and velocity updates.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Set control mode to TEST_1. Simulate 'Right' key press for 60 frames. Monitor player X position.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player's X position should increase significantly from the start position. Game state should log changes.
TEST_1.description: Verify player movement physics and velocity updates.

TEST_1.expected: Player's X position should increase significantly from the start position. Game state should log changes.

TEST_2.test_description: Validate collision detection and damage system.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Set control mode to TEST_2. Spawn an enemy directly on top of the player. Disable player movement.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player health should decrease upon contact. Game phase should eventually transition to GAME_OVER_LOSE when health reaches 0.

TEST_3.test_description: Test projectile spawning and physics for Wizard class.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Set class to Wizard. Simulate 'Z' key press. Check entity list for 'projectile' type.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: A new projectile entity should appear in gameState.entities and move in the facing direction.
TEST_3.description: Test projectile spawning and physics for Wizard class.
TEST_3.strategy: Set class to Wizard. Simulate 'Z' key press. Check entity list for 'projectile' type.
TEST_3.expected: A new projectile entity should appear in gameState.entities and move in the facing direction.

TEST_5.test_description: Test collectible interaction and score update.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Spawn a coin at player position. Update physics loop.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Coin should be removed from the world. Game score should increase by the coin's value.
TEST_5.description: Test collectible interaction and score update.
TEST_5.strategy: Spawn a coin at player position. Update physics loop.
TEST_5.expected: Coin should be removed from the world. Game score should increase by the coin's value.

TEST_7.test_description: Test Game Over to Restart cycle.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Trigger GAME_OVER state. Press 'R'. Check gamePhase.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Game should reset everything (score, entities) and return to START phase.
TEST_7.description: Test Game Over to Restart cycle.
TEST_7.strategy: Trigger GAME_OVER state. Press 'R'. Check gamePhase.
TEST_7.expected: Game should reset everything (score, entities) and return to START phase.
